GetSVG  (Scanning…)
Scanning page…
About
Quick Start Guide
  1. Click the extension icon — GetSVG auto-scans the page
  2. Click COPY or SAVE on any detected SVG
  3. RIGHT-CLICK any SVG on the page for a quick context menu
  4. HIGHLIGHT ALL shows every SVG's position on the page
  5. LOCATE scrolls the page to a specific SVG
getsvg.xyz
We build tools for designers & developers who care about craft. GetSVG is free to use — help us keep building, donate.
Built by
ADAUI Studio

v1.0.0
Pro
Pro Active
Thanks for supporting GetSVG!
  • Download Bulk as ZIP Grab every SVG on the page at once — packed into a single ZIP file.
  • Copy as Data URI Copy SVG as a base64 string — embed it directly in CSS or HTML, no separate file needed.
  • Optimize with SVGO Auto-compress SVGs before copying or downloading — smaller and cleaner.
Deactivate Pro?
You will lose access to all Pro features. Your license key can be re-entered anytime to re-activate.
